[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010000 2
1 0010010 2
2 1001011 4
3 1100100 3
4 0100100 2
5 1111001 5
6 0101110 4
7 1010101 4

01 10 0000100 1
12 21 0010101 3
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 1000000 1
45 54 1100110 4
56 65 0001011 3
67 76 0011011 4
70 07 0000010 1

02 20 0000110 2
13 31 1000000 1
24 42 0110110 4
35 53 1000000 1
46 64 0010010 2 match 1
57 75 1001011 4 match 2
60 06 0000010 1
71 17 1010001 3

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 1010100 3
25 52 0101111 5
36 63 0000000 a
47 74 1010010 3
50 05 0000110 2
61 16 0010001 2
72 27 0011011 4

04 40 0000110 2
15 51 1000101 3
26 62 0011011 4
37 73 1000000 1
